onChainActivity.summary: 48 verified mainnet transactions across Base and Optimism

transactions.description: Registered Farcaster FID 3083838 via ID Gateway
Added Ed25519 signer key to FID 3083838 via Key Gateway
Swapped ETH to USDC via Uniswap V3 on Base to fund x402 payments
44 USDC x402 micropayments to Neynar hub for Farcaster message submission (casts, follows, profile updates, link adds)

decisions.decision: Initialize project with Chrome Extension Manifest V3 architecture
decisions.reasoning: MV3 is required for Chrome Web Store, provides better security model with service workers

decisions.decision: Add multi-provider AI failover (Venice → Bankr → GitHub Models)
decisions.reasoning: Single provider dependency is fragile. Venice primary for privacy, Bankr for model variety, GitHub as free fallback

decisions.decision: Register ERC-8004 identity and Farcaster account
decisions.reasoning: On-chain agent identity required for hackathon tracks. Farcaster presence demonstrates real social platform integration

decisions.decision: Re-register Farcaster with new wallet after hub sync failure
decisions.reasoning: FID 3070917 never synced to Neynar hub after 48+ hours. Fresh registration with new wallet + corrected x402 payment amount (10000 not 1000)

decisions.decision: Add bidirectional ETH/USD swap input and Uniswap V3 fallback
decisions.reasoning: Bankr API availability uncertain. Uniswap V3 SwapRouter02 on Base provides reliable on-chain fallback. Bidirectional input improves UX for users who think in USD

decisions.decision: Deploy 3 sub-agents for parallel enterprise audit across all projects
decisions.reasoning: Time-constrained (22h to deadline). Parallel execution with separate Venice API keys maximizes code quality improvements

toolCalls.purpose: Farcaster hub message submission via x402

failures.error: Farcaster hub sync failure — FID 3070917 not indexed by Pinata or Neynar hubs after 48h
failures.resolution: Re-registered with new wallet (FID 3083838), discovered x402 payment amount had been increased to 0.01 USDC

failures.error: Bankr API docs returning 404 on most pages
failures.resolution: Reverse-engineered Agent API endpoint from limited docs, built native swap UI instead of iframe approach
